question.label: Growth blockers
question.name: What's in your way of getting to the next level — not what's missing, what's actively blocking?
question.description: Forces specificity about obstacles rather than vague 'more opportunities please'.

assessment.note: Answer 'clear' does not engage with the question's axis, providing no signal on growth or clarity.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?

new_queue.label: Current focus
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately?

new_queue.label: Workload adjustment
new_queue.name: How is your workload feeling since your injury?

new_queue.label: Skill focus during recovery
new_queue.name: What skills do you feel you can focus on while recovering?

new_queue.label: Support needs
new_queue.name: What support do you think you need from me during your recovery?

new_queue.label: Role clarity
new_queue.name: What part of your role or expectations feels unclear right now?

new_queue.label: Feedback on past projects
new_queue.name: How did you find the feedback on your projects before your injury?

new_queue.label: Motivation post-injury
new_queue.name: What's keeping you motivated as you return to work?

new_queue.label: Energy levels
new_queue.name: How's your energy at work on a typical day lately?

new_queue.label: Manager feedback
new_queue.name: Is there any feedback you need from me that you haven't received yet?

new_queue.label: Learning resources
new_queue.name: Are there any learning resources you think would help your growth right now?
